headline: The Debates That Matter For ACN Stock
summary: Accenture is spending billions to pivot toward new growth markets, but when analysts last pressed management, the focus was squarely on the immediate stumbles in the core business.

raw.headline: The Debates That Matter For ACN Stock
raw.summary: Accenture is spending billions to pivot toward new growth markets, but when analysts last pressed management, the focus was squarely on the immediate stumbles in the core business.

headline: Tesla Joins Uber in Putting the Brakes on Employee AI Spending
summary: Tesla has capped employee AI spending weeks after Uber imposed similar limits, signaling a broader shift as companies rein in soaring AI costs.

raw.headline: Tesla Joins Uber in Putting the Brakes on Employee AI Spending
